title: Routines
description: Automations for a Houston agent. Each routine wakes exactly one way: on a cron schedule ('schedule') or when an external event arrives ('trigger') — set one, never both.

prompt.description: Prompt sent to Claude when the routine fires.

schedule.description: Cron expression (e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5'). Omit when 'trigger' is set.

toolkit.description: Connected app that emits the event (e.g. 'gmail').

trigger_config.description: Event filters, validated against the event type's config schema.

connected_account_id.description: Pins one account when the user connected the app more than once; otherwise omit.

trigger.description: External event that wakes this routine. Omit when 'schedule' is set.

suppress_when_silent.description: If true, runs that respond ROUTINE_OK are silent.

chat_mode.description: Whether each run reuses one chat ('shared', the default) or starts a fresh chat per run ('per_run').

integrations.description: Composio toolkit slugs this routine uses (e.g. ['gmail', 'slack']).

provider.description: Provider id override (e.g. 'anthropic', 'openai'); null/absent means inherit the agent's provider.

model.description: Model override (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-8', 'gpt-5.5'); null/absent means inherit the agent's model.

effort.description: Reasoning-effort override (e.g. 'high', 'max'); validated per-provider at dispatch; null/absent means inherit the agent's effort.

setup_activity_id.description: Id of the setup chat attached to this routine. When Houston asks you to create or change a routine from a chat, it tells you the exact id to write here; otherwise preserve any existing value unchanged.
